text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While strolling through the park, I run into
Marvelous Sunday and Mayano Top Gun taking a
quick break during their jog.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Marvelous timing, Trainer! Could you take a
picture of us by the pond together? The water's
so sparkly!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Yippee! Thanks, Trainer! Here, use my phone!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Eek!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Mayano slips, her phone launches from her
hand and sails straight into the pond's depths.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Mayday, mayday...
I think my phone is done for...

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Chin up, Mayano! In times like these, you've
gotta stay positive! ☆

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Believe in the marvelous, and it'll believe in
you! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: B-believe in the marvelous? How do I do that?

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Like this!
To me, my woof-derful friends! We need your
marvelous help! ☆★

text_block_list.name: Dogs
text_block_list.text: Woof! Woof, woof! Bark, woof!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
From out of nowhere, dogs come streaming in,
forming ranks before Marvelous Sunday!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Marvelous! ☆
Thanks for coming, everyone! Let's get to work! ★

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Marvelous Sunday dives into the water, quickly
followed by the canine crew.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
M-Marvey?!
What do we do, Trainer?! She's not coming back
up!

text_block_list.name: Gray Dog
text_block_list.text: Woof! Woof, woof!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Whew! Mayanooo! We found it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At the dog's barking, Marvelous Sunday pops her
head out of the water. She looks no worse for
wear.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Don't scare us like that, Marvey! You could've
said something first!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, Mayano! You looked so sad, I couldn't help
myself! But now you have your phone back, don't
you?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Thanks, Marvey! That was suuuper
marvelous!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Now you're getting it! Say it again with me:
suuuper marvelous! ☆★

text_block_list.name: Dogs
text_block_list.text: Woof!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hey, I recognize these doggies! They're the ones
you're always hanging out with!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Wherever you look, the world's full of
marvelous friends! ☆ All you've gotta do is ask,
and they'll come running to help!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I guess I owe them too, don't I?
Thanks a ton, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
With so many paws pitching in, we found your
phone in no time! Didn't even get waterlogged! ☆
choice_data_list:
It's good to help your friends, but don't hurt
yourself in the process.

It's good to help your friends, but don't hurt
yourself in the process.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
With so many paws pitching in, we found your
phone in no time! Didn't even get waterlogged! ☆
choice_data_list:
It's good to help your friends, but don't hurt
yourself in the process.

It's good to help your friends, but don't hurt
yourself in the process.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
You betcha! And I appreciate the advice! But
sometimes, you've gotta go above and beyond to
be marvelous!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Mayano, can you check if your phone's
working okay?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Oh, good idea!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Wow! Look at all these underwater photos!
Did you take these, Marvey?

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
I did! While I was down there, I was struck by
marvelous inspiration!☆ Ahaha! ★
Ahahahahaha! ☆

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Don't worry, I'm fi—achoo!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Yeep! You're shivering, Marvey! We've gotta
hurry back and get you changed into something
dry!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Aw, don't fret so much, Mayano. If you frown too
much, your face'll get stuck!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
I guess we'd better hurry back so that doesn't
happen—and before I catch a cold! Ahaha! ★
Ahahahahaha! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Marvelous Sunday and Mayano Top Gun are all
smiles as they leave, their spirits undampened by
the minor crisis.
